title: AutoEnable
description: Represents which scan types are automatically enabled for new members of your Amazon Inspector organization.

allOf.description: Represents whether Amazon EC2 scans are automatically enabled for new members of your Amazon Inspector organization.
Represents whether Amazon ECR scans are automatically enabled for new members of your Amazon Inspector organization.
Represents whether AWS Lambda standard scans are automatically enabled for new members of your Amazon Inspector organization.

Represents whether AWS Lambda code scans are automatically enabled for new members of your Amazon Inspector organization.
